task_description: Assess the risks of launching a new SaaS product in the healthcare market, considering regulatory, technical, and market risks.

risk_factors.name: HIPAA compliance
risk_factors.description: All patient data must be HIPAA compliant; audit pending

risk_factors.name: Market timing
risk_factors.description: Two competitors launching similar products within 3 months

risk_factors.name: Integration requirements
risk_factors.description: Must integrate with 5 major EHR systems (Epic, Cerner, etc.)

risk_factors.name: Regulatory approval
risk_factors.description: May require FDA 510(k) clearance depending on feature set

risk_factors.name: Data breach liability
risk_factors.description: Healthcare data breaches average $10.9M in costs

risk_factors.name: Vendor lock-in
risk_factors.description: Core infrastructure built on single cloud provider

input_data.context: Series A startup with 18 months of runway
